### Hi there 👋 I'm Emmanuel
[![AltSchool Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/-Engineering-6773E5?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/png;base64,&logoColor=white&link=https://altschoolafrica.com/schools/engineering)](https://altschoolafrica.com/schools/engineering) 


# About Me:
Software engineer experienced in building scalable APIs, cloud infrastructure, and AI-powered systems across fintech, edtech, and media platforms. Currently leading backend engineering at Keyrium, owning architecture, CI/CD pipelines, and AWS infrastructure for two production APIs serving concurrent mobile and web users.

Stack: Node.js · TypeScript · Python · PostgreSQL · AWS · Docker · LangChain · OpenAI API · RAG · NestJS · GraphQL

Open to remote backend and AI engineering roles.

📩 okeowoemmanuelm@gmail.com
